channel.title: Simon Dong Blog
channel.description: Machine learning systems, LLM internals, and technical notes by Simon Dong.

item.title: Understanding MLA Decoding (Materialize vs Absorb)
item.description: The two ways to run Multi-head Latent Attention at inference, and the crossover that decides which one to use, with interactive charts.

item.title: Understanding MLA (Multi-head Latent Attention)
item.description: How DeepSeek-style MLA stores one latent KV state, splits nope from rope, and why training code looks different from optimized decode.

item.title: Understanding GQA (Grouped-Query Attention)
item.description: The query-to-KV head mapping that shrinks the KV cache of modern LLMs, and where GQA stands among 2026 attention variants. Part 1 of the Attention Variants series.

item.title: Understanding RoPE (Rotary Position Embeddings)
item.description: A visual, step-by-step explanation of Rotary Position Embeddings and the clock-hand intuition behind modern LLM positional encoding.
